items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of an equipment check for classroom technology, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this specific check has been performed or is in place. The linked use case mentions the need for an equipment check, but the prior steps do not provide any evidence of the actual implementation or testing of this requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
